title: podman auto-update system test flake
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

The `podman auto-update - label io.containers.autoupdate=local with rollback` system test is flaking.
```
not ok 189 podman auto-update - label io.containers.autoupdate=local with rollback
# (from function `systemctl' in file test/system/helpers.systemd.bash, line 25,
#  from function `generate_service' in file test/system/255-auto-update.bats, line 84,
#  in test file test/system/255-auto-update.bats, line 256)
#   `generate_service $image local /runme --sdnotify=container noTag' failed
# $ podman rm --all --force
# $ podman ps --all --external --format {{.ID}} {{.Names}}
# $ podman images --all --format {{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.ID}}
# quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210610 9f9ec7f2fdef
# $ podman build -t quay.io/libpod/test -f /tmp/podman_bats.PPSjv3/Dockerfile.1
# STEP 1/3: FROM quay.io/libpod/fedora:31
# Trying to pull quay.io/libpod/fedora:31...
# Getting image source signatures
# Copying blob sha256:c28ace6b0c4ae099f6f81091731bdf41d9771d28bad96ae4a3507fe950560930
# Copying blob sha256:c28ace6b0c4ae099f6f81091731bdf41d9771d28bad96ae4a3507fe950560930
# Copying config sha256:a7a37f74ff864eec55891b64ad360d07020827486e30a92ea81d16459645b26a
# Writing manifest to image destination
# Storing signatures
# STEP 2/3: RUN echo -e "#!/bin/sh\nprintenv NOTIFY_SOCKET; echo READY; systemd-notify --ready;\ntrap 'echo Received SIGTERM, finishing; exit' SIGTERM; echo WAITING; while :; do sleep 0.1; done" >> /runme
# --> e86bcbe0f59
# STEP 3/3: RUN chmod +x /runme
# COMMIT quay.io/libpod/test
# --> 695f49d376e
# Successfully tagged quay.io/libpod/test:latest
# 695f49d376e528c53a2583131fd7e8c29baa71aa380f99a516ede283118dedc7
# 695f49d376e528c53a2583131fd7e8c29baa71aa380f99a516ede283118dedc7
# $ podman create --sdnotify=container --name c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ --label io.containers.autoupdate=local quay.io/libpod/test:latest /runme
# 5fd701c937dbbd10b912c984b42fadd76b9b222e30b361e85d4d71797f647d96
# $ podman generate systemd --new --files --name c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ
# /run/user/3643/systemd/user/container-c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ.service
# $ podman rm -f c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ
# 5fd701c937dbbd10b912c984b42fadd76b9b222e30b361e85d4d71797f647d96
# Job for container-c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ.service failed because a timeout was exceeded.
# See "systemctl --user status container-c_local_zZtlr9OFGQ.service" and "journalctl --user -xe" for details.
# $ podman rmi -f quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest quay.io/libpod/busybox:latest quay.io/libpod/localtest:latest quay.io/libpod/autoupdatebroken:latest quay.io/libpod/test:latest quay.io/libpod/fedora:31
# Untagged: quay.io/libpod/test:latest
# Untagged: quay.io/libpod/fedora:31
# Deleted: 695f49d376e528c53a2583131fd7e8c29baa71aa380f99a516ede283118dedc7
# Deleted: e86bcbe0f599bb223206ce8aa2323c2f2da972fc5d71dc221c7f520ebc6384d1
# Deleted: a7a37f74ff864eec55891b64ad360d07020827486e30a92ea81d16459645b26a
# Error: 4 errors occurred:
# 	* quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest: image not known
# 	* quay.io/libpod/busybox:latest: image not known
# 	* quay.io/libpod/localtest:latest: image not known
# 	* quay.io/libpod/autoupdatebroken:latest: image not known
# [ rc=1 ]
# $ podman image prune -f
# # [teardown]
# $ podman pod rm --all --force
# $ podman rm --all --force
```
Some failed log files:
https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6707773544071168/html/sys-podman-ubuntu-2104-rootless-host.log.html
https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/5214339025076224/html/sys-podman-ubuntu-2104-root-host.log.html
https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6735479002365952/html/sys-podman-ubuntu-2104-rootless-host.log.html
https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/6171693308706816/html/sys-podman-ubuntu-2104-rootless-host.log.html

comments.body: I open a PR to skip this test so @vrothberg can take a look once he is back.
Local testing suggests that https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11246 is fixing the flake. I'll open another PR to reenable once https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11246 got in.
The flake has been fixed by https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11246.  Thanks for creating the issue!
